name: refactor_002_result_formatter
description: Introduce a shared result formatter used by both HTTP and CLI presentation layers.
reference_solution_notes: Category rationale: this task is a refactor because the job result shape should become centralized without changing the observable HTTP or CLI payloads. It is not a disguised bug fix because the tests enforce shared formatting rather than a broken output contract.
mutability_notes: Non-trivial because the runner must understand the raw service object, preserve rendering behavior, and wire both output paths through the new formatter.
